creator: koinec@yahoo.co.jp
text:
Created attachment 217788
Update port: audio/playumidi: Fails to build on FreeBSD 13-current

I'm sorry.
Fix unfetchable error and update the port patch.
Sorry to trouble you, but please check again.
(This was due to incorrect usage of the OSDN clause in the Makefile.
 For this reason I removed the file id from the OSDN clause.)
